title: AI categorize is here!
excerpt:

posts.author: Noa_F (Noa Finkelshtein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Noa from the monday.com product team and I am excited to share that we released a feature that lets you categorize text columns to any status columns’ labels, with the new AI categorize block in automation.

What can you do with this feature?

  • Save time by letting AI auto-categorize your columns
  • Can be used for any desired use case such as:
  • Auto-categorizing requests by urgency, type, related topic, etc.
  • Auto-categorizing feedback by sentiment, requested feature, etc.

AI-powered categorization works best when

  • It’s based on informative text
  • There are 2-8 high-variability, self-explanatory labels in your status column

Check out some cool AI-powered workflows in the examples and comments below. We can’t wait to see yours! Share your feedback and ideas with us.

What next:

  • Dropdown column will also be supported in a few days in the categorize automation!
  • Another exciting & useful new AI block will be released in a few days, stay tuned:))

If you haven’t yet approved AI for your account, click the AI icon in the board header or contact your CSM.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: SO excited about this one! Thank you for sharing Noa!

posts.author: Domandu (Dominick Coppinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Very cool @Noa_F! Not to try being too demanding with a new feature

But is there a plan to support subitems with this functionality in the near future too?
